setting.name: sector
setting.description: Defines the 'sector' of your instrument position. Valid values are "N","S","E" and "W"

setting.name: beamline
setting.description: Defines the 'beamline number' of your instrument position. Valid values are 1..10 or 1..11 depending on sector

setting.name: yheight
setting.description: Defines the moderator height. Valid values are 0.03 m and 0.06 m

setting.name: cold_frac
setting.description: Defines the statistical fraction of events emitted from the cold part of the moderator

setting.name: target_index
setting.description: Relative index of component to focus at, e.g. next is +1 this is used to compute 'dist' automatically.

setting.name: dist
setting.description: Distance from origin to focusing rectangle; at (0,0,dist) - alternatively use target_index

setting.name: focus_xw
setting.description: Width of focusing rectangle

setting.name: focus_yh
setting.description: Height of focusing rectangle

setting.name: c_performance
setting.description: Cold brilliance scalar performance multiplicator c_performance > 0

setting.name: t_performance
setting.description: Thermal brilliance scalar performance multiplicator t_performance > 0

setting.name: Lmin
setting.description: Minimum wavelength simulated

setting.name: Lmax
setting.description: Maximum wavelength simulated

setting.name: tmax_multiplier
setting.description: Defined maximum emission time at moderator, tmax= tmax_multiplier * ESS_PULSE_DURATION.

setting.name: n_pulses
setting.description: Number of pulses simulated. 0 and 1 creates one pulse.

setting.name: acc_power
setting.description: Accelerator power in MW

setting.name: tfocus_dist
setting.description: Position of time focusing window along z axis

setting.name: tfocus_time
setting.description: Time position of time focusing window

setting.name: tfocus_width
setting.description: Time width of time focusing window

display.source:
#ifndef OPENACC
  magnify("");
  butterfly_geometry(delta_y, jmax, cx, cz,
    orientation_angle, Beamlines, tx,ty,tz,
    rC1_x,rC1_z,rC2_x,rC2_z,rC3_x,rC3_z, 
    rT1_x,rT1_z,rT2_x,rT2_z,rT3_x,rT3_z,
    r11, r12, r21, r22, focus_xw, focus_yh);
 #endif

setting.name: xwidth
setting.description: width at the guide entry, mid or exit (see dimensionsAt)

setting.name: yheight
setting.description: height at the guide entry, mid or exit (see dimensionsAt)

setting.name: l
setting.description: length of the guide

setting.name: linxw
setting.description: distance from 1st focal point to guide entrance - left and right horizontal mirrors

setting.name: loutxw
setting.description: distance from 2nd focal point to guide exit - left and right horizontal mirrors

setting.name: linyh
setting.description: distance from 1st focal point to guide entrance - top and bottom vertical mirrors

setting.name: loutyh
setting.description: distance from 2nd focal point to guide exit - top and bottom vertical mirrors

setting.name: minorAxisxw
setting.description: direct defination of the guide geometry, will ignore w,h lin and lout parameters if this is nonzero. Length of the axis Perpendicular to the z for the horizontal ellipse

setting.name: majorAxisyh
setting.description: direct defination of the guide geometry, will ignore w,h lin and lout parameters if this is nonzero. Length of the axis parallel to the z for the vertical ellipse

setting.name: minorAxisyh
setting.description: direct defination of the guide geometry, will ignore w,h lin and lout parameters if this is nonzero. Length of the axis Perpendicular to the z for the vertical ellipse

setting.name: majorAxisoffsetxw
setting.description: direct defination of the guide geometry, distance between the center of the horizontal ellipse and the guide entrance

setting.name: majorAxisoffsetyh
setting.description: direct defination of the guide geometry, distance between the center of the vertical ellipse and the guide entrance

setting.name: dimensionsAt
setting.description: define whether xwidth and yheight sets the size of the opening, minor axis or the end of the guide.

setting.name: option
setting.description: options are 'ellipse' and 'halfEllipse'. Ellipse is defined by both the focal points, while halfEllipse locked the center of the ellipse either the entrance or exit of the guide, and use the focal point of the other end to define the ellipse

setting.name: R0
setting.description: Low-angle reflectivity

setting.name: Qc
setting.description: Critical scattering vector

setting.name: alpha
setting.description: Slope of reflectivity

setting.name: m
setting.description: m-value of material for all mirrors, zero means complete absorption.

setting.name: W
setting.description: Width of supermirror cut-off

setting.name: alpharight
setting.description: Slope of reflectivity for right vertical mirror

setting.name: mright
setting.description: m-value of material for right vertical mirror

setting.name: alphaleft
setting.description: Slope of reflectivity for left vertical mirror

setting.name: mleft
setting.description: m-value of material for left vertical mirror

setting.name: alphatop
setting.description: Slope of reflectivity for top horizontal mirror, overwrites alpha

setting.name: mtop
setting.description: m-value of material for top horizontal mirror, overwrites m

setting.name: alphabottom
setting.description: Slope of reflectivity for bottom horizontal mirror

setting.name: mbottom
setting.description: m-value of material for bottom horizontal mirror

setting.name: verbose
setting.description: Give extra information about calculations

setting.name: enableGravity
setting.description: Flag to select propagation with gravity.

setting.name: curvature
setting.description: Simulate horizontal radius of curvature by centripetal force added to the gravity. Note: Does not curve the guide in mcdisplay but "curves the neutron". Has opposite sign definition of Guide_curved.

setting.name: nSegments
setting.description: Must be used to specify number of guide segments, i.e. when giving inputs mvaluesright ... etc.

setting.name: mvaluesright
setting.description: Pointer to array of m-values, right mirror

setting.name: mvaluesleft
setting.description: - same, left mirror

setting.name: mvaluestop
setting.description: - same, top mirror

setting.name: mvaluesbottom
setting.description: - same, bottom mirror

setting.name: seglength
setting.description: Pointer to array of segment lengths for discrete mirror description

setting.name: theta_0
setting.description: Angular width of the slits.

setting.name: radius
setting.description: Radius of the disc

setting.name: yheight
setting.description: Slit height (if = 0, equal to radius). Auto centering of beam at half height.

setting.name: nu
setting.description: Frequency of the Chopper, omega=2*PI*nu (algebraic sign defines the direction of rotation)

setting.name: nslit
setting.description: Number of slits, regularly arranged around the disk

setting.name: jitter
setting.description: Jitter in the time phase

setting.name: delay
setting.description: Time 'delay'

setting.name: isfirst
setting.description: Set it to 1 for the first chopper position in a cw source (it then spreads the neutron time distribution)

setting.name: n_pulse
setting.description: Number of pulses (Only if isfirst)

setting.name: abs_out
setting.description: Absorb neutrons hitting outside of chopper radius?

setting.name: phase
setting.description: Angular 'delay' (overrides delay)

setting.name: xwidth
setting.description: Horizontal slit width opening at beam center

setting.name: verbose
setting.description: Set to 1 to display Disk chopper configuration

setting.name: w1
setting.description: Width at the guide entry

setting.name: h1
setting.description: Height at the guide entry

setting.name: w2
setting.description: Width at the guide exit. If 0, use w1.

setting.name: h2
setting.description: Height at the guide exit. If 0, use h1.

setting.name: l
setting.description: length of guide

setting.name: R0
setting.description: Low-angle reflectivity

setting.name: Qc
setting.description: Critical scattering vector

setting.name: alpha
setting.description: Slope of reflectivity

setting.name: m
setting.description: m-value of material. Zero means completely absorbing. m=0.65  glass/SiO2 Si   Ni  Ni58  supermirror Be    Diamond m=  0.65       0.47 1   1.18  2-6         1.01  1.12 for glass/SiO2, m=1 for Ni, 1.2 for Ni58, m=2-6 for supermirror. m=0.47 for Si

setting.name: W
setting.description: Width of supermirror cut-off

setting.name: nslit
setting.description: Number of vertical channels in the guide (>= 1) (nslit-1 vertical dividing walls).

setting.name: d
setting.description: Thickness of subdividing walls

setting.name: mleft
setting.description: m-value of material for left.   vert. mirror

setting.name: mright
setting.description: m-value of material for right.  vert. mirror

setting.name: mtop
setting.description: m-value of material for top.    horz. mirror

setting.name: mbottom
setting.description: m-value of material for bottom. horz. mirror

setting.name: nhslit
setting.description: Number of horizontal channels in the guide (>= 1). (nhslit-1 horizontal dividing walls). this enables to have nslit*nhslit rectangular channels

setting.name: G
setting.description: Gravitation norm. 0 value disables G effects.

setting.name: aleft
setting.description: alpha-value of left  vert. mirror

setting.name: aright
setting.description: alpha-value of right vert. mirror

setting.name: atop
setting.description: alpha-value of top   horz. mirror

setting.name: abottom
setting.description: alpha-value of left  horz. mirror

setting.name: wavy
setting.description: Global guide waviness

setting.name: wavy_z
setting.description: Partial waviness along propagation axis

setting.name: wavy_tb
setting.description: Partial waviness in transverse direction for top/bottom mirrors

setting.name: wavy_lr
setting.description: Partial waviness in transverse direction for left/right mirrors

setting.name: chamfers
setting.description: Global chamfers specifications (in/out/mirror sides).

setting.name: chamfers_z
setting.description: Input and output chamfers

setting.name: chamfers_lr
setting.description: Chamfers on left/right mirror sides

setting.name: chamfers_tb
setting.description: Chamfers on top/bottom mirror sides

setting.name: nelements
setting.description: Number of sections in the guide (length l/nelements).

setting.name: nu
setting.description: Rotation frequency (round/s) for Fermi Chopper approximation

setting.name: phase
setting.description: Phase shift for the Fermi Chopper approximation

setting.name: reflect
setting.description: Reflectivity file name. Format <q(Angs-1) R(0-1)>

setting.name: frame
setting.description: Duration of one frame

setting.name: frequency
setting.description: Source (modulus) frequency, overrides frame length

setting.name: dt
setting.description: Length of each time bin

setting.name: nt
setting.description: Number of time bins

setting.name: filename
setting.description: Name of file in which to store the detector image

setting.name: xmin
setting.description: Lower x bound of detector opening

setting.name: xmax
setting.description: Upper x bound of detector opening

setting.name: ymin
setting.description: Lower y bound of detector opening

setting.name: ymax
setting.description: Upper y bound of detector opening

setting.name: xwidth
setting.description: Width of detector. Overrides xmin, xmax

setting.name: yheight
setting.description: Height of detector. Overrides ymin, ymax

setting.name: restore_neutron
setting.description: If set, the monitor does not influence the neutron state

setting.name: writefile
setting.description: If set to 0, monitor will skip writing to disk, default = 1

setting.name: cfg
setting.description: NCrystal material configuration string (details on this page).

setting.name: absorptionmode
setting.description: 0 : disable absorption. 1 : enable absorption via intensity reduction. 2 : enable absorption by terminating the tracking.

setting.name: multscat
setting.description: 0 : disable multiple scattering. 1 : enable multiple scattering

setting.name: xwidth
setting.description: x-dimension (width) of sample, if box shape is desired

setting.name: yheight
setting.description: y-dimension (height) of sample, if box or cylinder shape is desired

setting.name: zdepth
setting.description: z-dimension (depth) of sample, if box shape is desired

setting.name: radius
setting.description: radius of sample, if sphere or cylinder shape is desired

setting.name: xmin
setting.description: Lower x bound

setting.name: xmax
setting.description: Upper x bound

setting.name: ymin
setting.description: Lower y bound

setting.name: ymax
setting.description: Upper y bound

setting.name: radius
setting.description: Radius of slit in the z=0 plane, centered at Origin

setting.name: xwidth
setting.description: Width of slit. Overrides xmin,xmax if they are unset.

setting.name: yheight
setting.description: Height of slit. Overrides ymin,ymax if they are unset.

setting.name: cfg
setting.description: NCrystal material configuration string, default to Beryllium at 77K (Be_sg194.ncmat;temp=77K)

setting.name: absorptionmode
setting.description: 0 : disable absorption. 1 : enable absorption via intensity reduction. 2 : enable absorption by terminating the tracking.

setting.name: multscat
setting.description: 0 : disable multiple scattering. 1 : enable multiple scattering

setting.name: filter_angle_minimum
setting.description: minimum angle of the filter in x-z plane (0 along z-axis)

setting.name: filter_angle_maximum
setting.description: maximum angle of the filter in x-z plane (0 along z-axis)

setting.name: filter_angle_width
setting.description: angular width of the filter in x-z plane (if filter_angle_minimum and filter_angle_maximum are not set, they will be set to -filter_angle_width/2 and +filter_angle_width/2, respectively)

setting.name: collimator_angle_minimum
setting.description: minimum angle of the collimator in x-z plane (0 along z-axis)

setting.name: collimator_angle_maximum
setting.description: maximum angle of the collimator in x-z plane (0 along z-axis)

setting.name: collimator_angle_width
setting.description: angular width of the collimator in x-z plane (if collimator_angle_minimum and collimator_angle_maximum are not set, they will be set to -collimator_angle_width/2 and +collimator_angle_width/2, respectively)

setting.name: angle_minimum
setting.description: minimum angle of the device in x-z plane (0 along z-axis)

setting.name: angle_maximum
setting.description: maximum angle of the device in x-z plane (0 along z-axis)

setting.name: angle_width
setting.description: angular width of the device in x-z plane (if angle_minimum and angle_maximum are not set, they will be set to -angle_width/2 and +angle_width/2, respectively)

setting.name: y_minimum
setting.description: minimum y-value of the device

setting.name: y_maximum
setting.description: maximum y-value of the device

setting.name: yheight
setting.description: y-dimension (height) of the device, used to set y_minimum and y_maximum if those are not set, default 0

setting.name: collimator_minimum_radius
setting.description: radius where the collimator channels start (i.e. the inner radius of the collimator)

setting.name: collimator_maximum_radius
setting.description: radius where the collimator channels end (i.e. the outer radius of the collimator)

setting.name: filter_minimum_radius
setting.description: radius where the filter starts (i.e. the inner radius of the filter)

setting.name: filter_maximum_radius
setting.description: radius where the filter ends (i.e. the outer radius of the filter)

setting.name: minimum_radius
setting.description: replaces minimum filter and collimator radius if those are UNSET, default 0

setting.name: maximum_radius
setting.description: replaces maximum filter and collimator radius if those are UNSET, default 0

setting.name: collimation
setting.description: angular width of the collimator channels

setting.name: reflect
setting.description: reflectivity file name of text file as 2 columns [k, R]

setting.name: transmit
setting.description: transmission file name of text file as 2 columns [k, T]

setting.name: zwidth
setting.description: horizontal width of an individual slab

setting.name: yheight
setting.description: vertical height of an individual slab

setting.name: gap
setting.description: typical gap between adjacent slabs

setting.name: NH
setting.description: number of slabs horizontal

setting.name: mosaich
setting.description: Horisontal mosaic FWHM

setting.name: mosaicv
setting.description: Vertical mosaic FWHM

setting.name: r0
setting.description: Maximum reflectivity. O unactivates component

setting.name: t0
setting.description: transmission efficiency

setting.name: Q
setting.description: Scattering vector

setting.name: RH
setting.description: radius of horizontal focussing. flat for 0

setting.name: DM
setting.description: monochromator d-spacing instead of Q=2*pi/DM

setting.name: mosaic
setting.description: sets mosaich=mosaicv

setting.name: width
setting.description: total width of monochromator, along Z

setting.name: verbose
setting.description: verbosity level

setting.name: order
setting.description: specify the diffraction order, 1 is usually prefered. Use 0 for all

setting.name: N
setting.description: The number of serially connected tubes, default=1, must be positive definite [1]

setting.name: wires_in_series
setting.description: If non-zero, the tubes have all wires connected in series [1]

setting.name: first_wire
setting.description: The index of the first wire, for setting the neutron property TUBE properly. [1]

setting.name: wire_step
setting.description: The difference in wire index between tube i and i+1 [1]

setting.name: no
setting.description: The number of bins per tube [1]

setting.name: wire_filename
setting.description: Name of file in which to store the detector image [string]

setting.name: levels
setting.description: The number of charge-division levels [1]

setting.name: threshold
setting.description: The minimum used level when simulating charge division [1]

setting.name: width
setting.description: Defines the tube positions if `positions` is undefined. Width is always the

setting.name: height
setting.description: Defines the tube-length if ends is undefined. [m]

setting.name: radius
setting.description: The common tube radius [m]

setting.name: R
setting.description: A constant resistance used for all inter-tube resistances if Rs is undefined. [ohm]

setting.name: rho
setting.description: A single resistivity use for all annode wires if rhos is undefined. [ohm/m]

setting.name: dead_length
setting.description: A characteristic length over which each tube loses sensitivity towards its end [m]

setting.name: curvature
setting.description: Radius of curvature of the tube-array in the (x,z) plane. [m]

setting.name: radii
setting.description: A pointer to a length-N array of doubles with per-tube radii [m]

setting.name: Rs
setting.description: A length-N+1 array of inter-tube resistances, with first and last values giving contact resistances  [ohm]

setting.name: preRs
setting.description: A length-N array of wire contact resistances, Rs takes precedence; if used in serial mode

setting.name: postRs
setting.description: A length-N array of wire contact resistances, Rs takes precedence; if used in serial mode

setting.name: rhos
setting.description: A length-N array of annode wire resitivities [ohm/m]

setting.name: positions
setting.description: A pointer to a length-3N array of doubles with the per-tube center of mass

setting.name: ends
setting.description: A pointer to a length-3N array of doubles with the per-tube center-of-mass to

setting.name: He3_pressure
setting.description: If finite, apply a detector efficiency correction [bar]

setting.name: charge_a
setting.description: The string name of the neutron property used to record one integrated voltage [str]

setting.name: charge_b
setting.description: The string name of the neutron property used to record one integrated voltage [str]

setting.name: detection_time
setting.description: The string name of the neutron property used to record event detection time [str]

setting.name: tube_index_name
setting.description: The string name of the neutron property used to record detecting wire readout [str]

setting.name: restore_neutron
setting.description: If set, the monitor does not influence the neutron state [1]

user.source: int secondary_cassette; // Secondary spectrometer analyzer cassette index
